originalTitle: Anthropic has officially filed to go public
summary: After months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first in their race to IPO, Anthropic on Monday reached a key milestone: filing to kick off the process with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing sets the stage for what's sure to be a massive IPO. As of its fundraise last […]
content: After months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first in their race to IPO, Anthropic on Monday reached a key milestone: filing to kick off the process with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing sets the stage for what’s sure to be a massive IPO. As of its fundraise last week, Anthropic is being called the world’s most valuable startup, with a post-money valuation of $965 billion. That tops the $852 billion post-money valuation of OpenAI, which is its biggest rival. Anthropic chose to submit its draft registration statement to the SEC confidentially, according to a blog post from the company, meaning key details typically included in that form about a company’s operations — like potential risks to its business, executive compensation, and other financials — won’t become public until later on in the process. The news comes less than two weeks before SpaceX’s planned June 12 IPO. Elon Musk’s SpaceX — which owns xAI and also has a newly minted deal with Anthropic that has the latter paying $15 billion per year to use SpaceX data centers — is currently set to raise $80 billion in its public debut, which would make it the largest IPO in history. The filing also comes shortly after OpenAI came out ahead in its high-profile legal battle with Musk, when a judge dismissed all claims due to the statute of limitations.
chineseSummary: 经过数月关于 OpenAI 或 Anthropic 是否会成为 IPO 竞争第一的猜测之后，Anthropic 于周一达到了一个重要的里程碑：向美国证券交易委员会提交申请，启动这一流程。该文件为大规模首次公开募股奠定了基础。截至上次筹款[...]
chineseContent: 经过数月关于 OpenAI 或 Anthropic 是否会成为 IPO 竞争第一的猜测之后，Anthropic 于周一达到了一个重要的里程碑：向美国证券交易委员会提交申请，启动这一流程。该文件为大规模首次公开募股奠定了基础。截至上周融资，Anthropic 被称为世界上最有价值的初创公司，融资后估值为 9650 亿美元。这超过了其最大竞争对手 OpenAI 8520 亿美元的投后估值。根据该公司的一篇博客文章，Anthropic 选择秘密向 SEC 提交其注册声明草案，这意味着该表格中通常包含的有关公司运营的关键细节（例如业务的潜在风险、高管薪酬和其他财务数据）直到流程后期才会公开。这一消息是在 SpaceX 计划于 6 月 12 日进行首次公开​​募股 (IPO) 前不到两周发布的。埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 旗下的 SpaceX 拥有 xAI，并与 Anthropic 达成了一项新协议，后者每年支付 150 亿美元使用 SpaceX 数据中心的费用，目前预计在首次公开募股中筹集 800 亿美元，这将使其成为历史上最大的 IPO。该文件发布前不久，OpenAI 在与马斯克的一场备受瞩目的法律诉讼中取得了领先，当时法官因诉讼时效而驳回了所有索赔。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
